STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_12 

LABEL: State and County FIPS Code — January through December 

DESCRIPTION: This field specifies the monthly concatenated state/county Federal Information Processing Standard 
(FIPS) code for the beneficiary — in January through December. 

LONG NAME: STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_01
